name: io.github.attestagents/attest-mcp
title: Attest
description: Scan agent payment endpoints (x402, MPP, AP2, L402, HTTP 402) and get a trust grade A–F with a safety verdict before your AI agent authorizes a payment.

environmentVariables.name: ATTEST_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Attest API base URL. Defaults to https://attestagent.org. Only needed for self-hosting or testing.
